strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience, spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems.
Demonstrates entrepreneurial experience within the tech community as the founder and developer of the open-source GISCollective platform.
Possesses hands-on builder fluency with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks the required Director-level scope, having exclusively held Senior and Staff developer roles focused on hands-on implementation rather than enterprise technology strategy.
Does not possess the preferred recognized expertise in AI or an advanced AI degree; his AI experience is limited to a single recent position rather than a proven history of building AI platforms.
Missing experience advising strategic customers and partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption, which is a key responsibility for this role.
response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum 15-year engineering experience threshold and possesses strong hands-on builder skills, he is fundamentally misaligned with the Director-level expectations of this Principal Engineer role. His career is heavily focused on full-stack web development, test automation, and GIS platforms, lacking the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and strategic cloud vision required. Furthermore, he has no demonstrated history of advising strategic enterprise partners or driving high-level AI product differentiation, making him a weak fit for a role centered on executive-level AI strategy.
